character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate and crew member who discusses becoming a 'gentleman of fortune' and shares stories of past exploits.

character_dossiers.name: the lad
character_dossiers.biography: A young crew member who engages in dialogue with Silver about joining a pirate's life.

character_dossiers.name: Israel Hands
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who expresses frustration with Captain Smollett and follows Silver's orders.

character_dossiers.name: the cook
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who mentions past financial dealings and a wife, and discusses crew dynamics.

character_dossiers.name: Barbecue
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member addressed by Silver, with no explicit details provided.

character_dossiers.name: old John
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member referenced in the context of past events and Silver's past.

character_dossiers.name: Cap'n Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: The ship's captain, mentioned as a target of the crew's discontent.
